## Type of change

- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `composer stan` passes
- [ ] `composer lint` passes (or `vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix` was run)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / examples) if the public API changed
